title: ephedra californica var. funerea
intro: Ephedra californica var. funerea, also known as California ephedra, is a shrub-like plant native to the southwestern United States and northern Mexico. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its ability to stimulate the respiratory system and increase alertness, which is attributed to the presence of ephedrine and pseudoephedrine. The health benefits of California ephedra include relieving respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as improving mental clarity and focus. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea or tincture, and in some cultures, it is also smoked to relieve respiratory congestion and promote energy.
